rationale: Educ. Code §12.023 governs certification of home-rule school district charters to the secretary of state. It is unrelated to property tax homestead exemptions under Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict exists.
quote: As soon as practicable after a school district adopts a home-rule school district charter or charter amendment, the president of the board of trustees shall certify to the secretary of state a copy of the charter or amendment showing the approval by the voters of the district.
_note: Rule text concerns charter certification procedure; no bearing on homestead exemption amounts.
